title: QCon London 2026: SBOMs Move From Best Practice to Legal Obligation as CRA Enforcement Looms
summary:
In a talk at QCon London 2026, Viktor Petersson argued that software teams are running out of time to adopt SBOMs (Software Bills of Materials) due to pending legislative changes in both the US and Europe.

He walked through the current regulatory landscape, spoke on the practical mechanics of generating high-quality SBOMs and on the emerging standards for distributing the resulting artefacts. By Matt Saunders
